title: Get Embeddings Dimensions (Candle)
cap_description: Query the dimensionality of embeddings for a given Candle model
documentation:
## Purpose

Reports the vector size that a Candle-based embedding model produces. Use this before creating a vector index so you know how many dimensions to allocate.

## Inputs

- A model spec pointing to a HuggingFace embedding model. Defaults to `all-MiniLM-L6-v2` (384 dimensions).

## Outputs

A single integer: the number of dimensions in each embedding vector this model produces.

## Notes

- The result is read from the model's saved configuration, not from running inference, so it is fast and requires no GPU memory.
- Use at pipeline setup time to parameterize downstream vector store caps.
- See also: [Generate Vector Embeddings (Candle)](https://capdag.com/browse/cap:candle;in="media:textable";ml-model;op=generate_embeddings;out="media:embedding-vector;textable;record")

args.arg_description: HuggingFace model name to query dimensions for
